---
title: "Anissa Chan"
image: "1744852758333.jpg"
title-block-banner: true
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link
          rel="stylesheet"
          href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"
          integrity="sha256-p4NxAoJBhIIN+hmNHrzRCf9tD/miZyoHS5obTRR9BMY="
          crossorigin=""
        />
        <script
          src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"
          integrity="sha256-20nQCchB9co0qIjJZRGuk2/Z9VM+kNiyxNV1lvTlZBo="
          crossorigin=""
        ></script>
---

::: {.hero-card}
::: {.columns .intro-grid}
::: {.column width="36%"}
![](1744852758333.jpg){.profile-photo}
:::

::: {.column width="64%"}
## Hi, I’m Anissa.

I’m based in the Bay Area and I’m always excited by thoughtful work, good design, and finding places worth coming back to.

You can reach me at [anc045@ucsd.edu](mailto:anc045@ucsd.edu) or connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/anissachan){target="_blank"}.
:::
:::
:::

## Home base

::: {.feature-card}
<p class="section-caption">
The Bay Area is home for me. Want to see how far away you are? Use your current location, or click anywhere on the map to compare from another place.
</p>

<div class="map-actions">
  <button id="locate-me" class="pill-button" type="button">Use my location</button>
  <span class="map-hint">or click anywhere on the map</span>
</div>

<div id="home-map" aria-label="Map centered on the Bay Area"></div>

<p id="distance-output" class="distance-output">
Your distance from the Bay Area will appear here.
</p>
:::

## Hobby

::: {.feature-card}
<p class="section-caption">
One of my favorite things to do is finding great food and drink spots. Here are some of my favorites.
</p>

<div class="scroll-buttons">
  <button class="scroll-btn" id="food-left" type="button" aria-label="Scroll left">←</button>
  <button class="scroll-btn" id="food-right" type="button" aria-label="Scroll right">→</button>
</div>

::: {#favorites-track .favorites-track}

::: {.favorite-card}
<p class="favorite-kicker">Favorite eats</p>

### [Tadaima Mission](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Tadaima+Mission+San+Francisco+CA){target="_blank"}

A repeat favorite that always makes my shortlist.

[Open in Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Tadaima+Mission+San+Francisco+CA){.favorite-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.favorite-card}
<p class="favorite-kicker">Favorite eats</p>

### [Shanxi Magic Kitchen](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Shanxi+Magic+Kitchen+San+Diego+CA){target="_blank"}

One of those spots I’m always happy to go back to.

[Open in Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Shanxi+Magic+Kitchen+San+Diego+CA){.favorite-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.favorite-card}
<p class="favorite-kicker">Favorite eats</p>

### [Ramen Nagi](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Ramen+Nagi+San+Diego+CA){target="_blank"}

A go-to when I want something comforting and reliable.

[Open in Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Ramen+Nagi+San+Diego+CA){.favorite-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.favorite-card}
<p class="favorite-kicker">Favorite eats</p>

### [An’s Electronics Repair](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=An%27s+Electronics+Repair+San+Diego+CA){target="_blank"}

A place that stands out enough to stay in regular rotation.

[Open in Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=An%27s+Electronics+Repair+San+Diego+CA){.favorite-link target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.favorite-card}
<p class="favorite-kicker">Favorite drinks</p>

### [Yun Tea](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Yun+Tea+House+San+Diego+CA){target="_blank"}

An easy favorite when I want something refreshing.

[Open in Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Yun+Tea+House+San+Diego+CA){.favorite-link target="_blank"}
:::

:::
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const bayArea = {
    label: "Bay Area",
    lat: 37.7749,
    lng: -122.4194,
    zoom: 8
  };

  const map = L.map("home-map").setView([bayArea.lat, bayArea.lng], bayArea.zoom);

  L.tileLayer("https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png", {
    maxZoom: 19,
    attribution: "&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors"
  }).addTo(map);

  L.marker([bayArea.lat, bayArea.lng])
    .addTo(map)
    .bindPopup("<strong>Bay Area</strong>")
    .openPopup();

  let visitorMarker = null;
  let routeLine = null;

  function haversineMiles(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) {
    const toRad = (deg) => deg * Math.PI / 180;
    const R = 3958.8;
    const dLat = toRad(lat2 - lat1);
    const dLon = toRad(lon2 - lon1);

    const a =
      Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +
      Math.cos(toRad(lat1)) *
      Math.cos(toRad(lat2)) *
      Math.sin(dLon / 2) *
      Math.sin(dLon / 2);

    const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
    return R * c;
  }

  function updateDistancePoint(lat, lng, label) {
    if (visitorMarker) {
      map.removeLayer(visitorMarker);
    }

    if (routeLine) {
      map.removeLayer(routeLine);
    }

    visitorMarker = L.marker([lat, lng]).addTo(map);
    visitorMarker.bindPopup(`<strong>${label}</strong>`).openPopup();

    routeLine = L.polyline([
      [bayArea.lat, bayArea.lng],
      [lat, lng]
    ]).addTo(map);

    const miles = haversineMiles(bayArea.lat, bayArea.lng, lat, lng);
    const km = miles * 1.60934;

    document.getElementById("distance-output").textContent =
      `${label} is about ${miles.toFixed(0)} miles (${km.toFixed(0)} km) from the Bay Area.`;

    map.fitBounds(routeLine.getBounds(), { padding: [40, 40] });
  }

  document.getElementById("locate-me").addEventListener("click", function () {
    const output = document.getElementById("distance-output");

    if (!navigator.geolocation) {
      output.textContent = "Location access is not available in this browser. You can still click anywhere on the map to compare from another place.";
      return;
    }

    output.textContent = "Finding your location...";

    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
      function (position) {
        updateDistancePoint(
          position.coords.latitude,
          position.coords.longitude,
          "You"
        );
      },
      function () {
        output.textContent = "I couldn’t access your location. You can still click anywhere on the map to compare from another place.";
      },
      {
        enableHighAccuracy: true,
        timeout: 10000,
        maximumAge: 0
      }
    );
  });

  map.on("click", function (e) {
    updateDistancePoint(e.latlng.lat, e.latlng.lng, "Selected point");
  });

  const track = document.getElementById("favorites-track");

  document.getElementById("food-left").addEventListener("click", function () {
    track.scrollBy({ left: -340, behavior: "smooth" });
  });

  document.getElementById("food-right").addEventListener("click", function () {
    track.scrollBy({ left: 340, behavior: "smooth" });
  });
});
</script>
